tEn: Photorealistic Text-to-Image Diffusion Models with Deep Language Understanding
tZh: 具有深度语言理解能力的逼真文本到图像扩散模型
sEn: Imagen achieves photorealistic text-to-image generation with deep language understanding by leveraging large language models.
sZh: Imagen通过利用大型语言模型，实现了具有深度语言理解能力的逼真文本到图像生成。
absEn: We present Imagen, a text-to-image diffusion model with an unprecedented degree of photorealism and a deep level of language understanding. Imagen builds on the power of large transformer language models in understanding text and hinges on the strength of diffusion models in high-fidelity image generation. Our key discovery is that generic large language models (e.g. T5), pretrained on text-only corpora, are surprisingly effective at encoding text for image synthesis: increasing the size of the language model in Imagen boosts both sample fidelity and image-text alignment much more than increasing the size of the image diffusion model. Imagen achieves a new state-of-the-art FID score of 7.27 on the COCO dataset, without ever training on COCO, and human raters find Imagen samples to be on par with the COCO data itself in image-text alignment. To assess text-to-image models in greater depth, we introduce DrawBench, a comprehensive and challenging benchmark for text-to-image models. With DrawBench, we compare Imagen with recent methods including VQ-GAN+CLIP, Latent Diffusion Models, and DALL-E 2, and find that human raters prefer Imagen over other models in side-by-side comparisons, both in terms of sample quality and image-text alignment. See https://imagen.research.google/ for an overview of the results.
absZh: 我们提出了Imagen，一种具有前所未有的逼真度和深度语言理解能力的文本到图像扩散模型。Imagen建立在大型Transformer语言模型理解文本的能力以及扩散模型高保真图像生成的优势之上。我们的关键发现是，仅在文本语料上预训练的通用大型语言模型（如T5）在编码文本用于图像合成方面出奇地有效：增加Imagen中语言模型的规模比增加图像扩散模型的规模更能提升样本保真度和图像-文本对齐。Imagen在COCO数据集上取得了7.27的FID分数，达到了新的最先进水平，且从未在COCO上训练过；人类评估者认为Imagen样本在图像-文本对齐方面与COCO数据本身相当。为了更深入地评估文本到图像模型，我们引入了DrawBench，一个全面且具有挑战性的基准。通过DrawBench，我们将Imagen与近期方法（包括VQ-GAN+CLIP、潜在扩散模型和DALL-E 2）进行比较，发现人类评估者在样本质量和图像-文本对齐方面都更偏好Imagen。

contrib.en: Imagen achieves state-of-the-art zero-shot FID of 7.27 on COCO, outperforming prior methods.
contrib.zh: Imagen在COCO上实现了7.27的零样本FID，优于先前方法。

contrib.en: Introduces DrawBench, a comprehensive benchmark for evaluating text-to-image models.
contrib.zh: 引入DrawBench，一个用于评估文本到图像模型的综合基准。

contrib.en: Shows that scaling large language models improves image quality more than scaling diffusion models.
contrib.zh: 表明扩大语言模型比扩大扩散模型更能提升图像质量。

contrib.en: Proposes dynamic thresholding for high guidance weights, improving photorealism and alignment.
contrib.zh: 提出动态阈值处理以支持高引导权重，提升逼真度和对齐性。

contrib.en: Demonstrates that frozen T5-XXL text encoder outperforms CLIP in human evaluation.
contrib.zh: 证明冻结的T5-XXL文本编码器在人类评估中优于CLIP。

contrib.en: Achieves human-level image-text alignment on COCO, with samples rated on par with reference images.
contrib.zh: 在COCO上达到人类水平的图像-文本对齐，样本与参考图像评分相当。

limits.en: Imagen struggles to generate photorealistic people, as shown by lower preference rates.
limits.zh: Imagen在生成逼真人物方面存在困难，偏好率较低。

limits.en: Training data contains biases and harmful content, limiting safe public deployment.
limits.zh: 训练数据包含偏见和有害内容，限制了安全公开部署。

limits.en: Model inherits social biases from language models, e.g., skin tone and gender stereotypes.
limits.zh: 模型继承了语言模型的社会偏见，如肤色和性别刻板印象。

limits.en: Evaluation focuses on English prompts; performance on other languages is unknown.
limits.zh: 评估集中于英文提示；其他语言的表现未知。

limits.en: High computational cost due to large model sizes and cascaded architecture.
limits.zh: 由于大模型规模和级联架构，计算成本高。

items.en: We present Imagen, a text-to-image diffusion model with an unprecedented degree of photorealism and a deep level of language understanding. Imagen builds on the power of large transformer language models in understanding text and hinges on the strength of diffusion models in high-fidelity image generation. Our key discovery is that generic large language models (e.g. T5), pretrained on text-only corpora, are surprisingly effective at encoding text for image synthesis: increasing the size of the language model in Imagen boosts both sample fidelity and image-text alignment much more than increasing the size of the image diffusion model. Imagen achieves a new state-of-the-art FID score of 7.27 on the COCO dataset, without ever training on COCO, and human raters find Imagen samples to be on par with the COCO data itself in image-text alignment. To assess text-to-image models in greater depth, we introduce DrawBench, a comprehensive and challenging benchmark for text-to-image models. With DrawBench, we compare Imagen with recent methods including VQ-GAN+CLIP, Latent Diffusion Models, GLIDE and DALL-E 2, and find that human raters prefer Imagen over other models in side-by-side comparisons, both in terms of sample quality and image-text alignment. See imagen.research.google for an overview of the results.
items.zh: 我们提出了Imagen，一种文本到图像的扩散模型，具有前所未有的逼真度和深层次的语言理解能力。Imagen建立在大型Transformer语言模型理解文本的能力以及扩散模型在高保真图像生成方面的优势之上。我们的关键发现是，仅在文本语料上预训练的通用大型语言模型（如T5）在编码文本用于图像合成方面出奇地有效：增加Imagen中语言模型的规模比增加图像扩散模型的规模更能提升样本保真度和图像-文本对齐。Imagen在COCO数据集上取得了7.27的最新FID分数，且从未在COCO上训练过，人类评估者发现Imagen样本在图像-文本对齐方面与COCO数据本身相当。为了更深入地评估文本到图像模型，我们引入了DrawBench，一个全面且具有挑战性的文本到图像模型基准。通过DrawBench，我们将Imagen与近期方法（包括VQ-GAN+CLIP、潜在扩散模型、GLIDE和DALL-E 2）进行比较，发现人类评估者在并排比较中更偏好Imagen，无论是在样本质量还是图像-文本对齐方面。结果概述请参见imagen.research.google。

items.en: Multimodal learning has come into prominence recently, with text-to-image synthesis [53, 12, 57] and image-text contrastive learning [49, 31, 74] at the forefront. These models have transformed the research community and captured widespread public attention with creative image generation [22, 54] and editing applications [21, 41, 34]. To pursue this research direction further, we introduce Imagen, a text-to-image diffusion model that combines the power of transformer language models (LMs) [15, 52] with high-fidelity diffusion models [28, 29, 16, 41] to deliver an unprecedented degree of photorealism and a deep level of language understanding in text-to-image synthesis. In contrast to prior work that uses only image-text data for model training [e.g., 53, 41], the key finding behind Imagen is that text embeddings from large LMs [52, 15], pretrained on text-only corpora, are remarkably effective for text-to-image synthesis. See Fig. 1 for select samples.
items.zh: 多模态学习最近变得突出，文本到图像合成[53, 12, 57]和图像-文本对比学习[49, 31, 74]处于前沿。这些模型通过创意图像生成[22, 54]和编辑应用[21, 41, 34]改变了研究社区并吸引了公众的广泛关注。为了进一步推进这一研究方向，我们引入了Imagen，一种文本到图像扩散模型，结合了Transformer语言模型（LM）[15, 52]的能力和高保真扩散模型[28, 29, 16, 41]，在文本到图像合成中实现了前所未有的逼真度和深层次的语言理解。与先前仅使用图像-文本数据进行模型训练的工作[例如，53, 41]不同，Imagen背后的关键发现是，来自大型LM[52, 15]（仅在文本语料上预训练）的文本嵌入对于文本到图像合成非常有效。参见图1中的示例样本。

items.en: Imagen comprises a frozen T5-XXL [52] encoder to map input text into a sequence of embeddings and a 64×64646464\!\times\!64 image diffusion model, followed by two super-resolution diffusion models for generating 256×256256256256\!\times\!256 and 1024×1024102410241024\!\times\!1024 images (see Fig. A.4). All diffusion models are conditioned on the text embedding sequence and use classifier-free guidance [27]. Imagen relies on new sampling techniques to allow usage of large guidance weights without sample quality degradation observed in prior work, resulting in images with higher fidelity and better image-text alignment than previously possible.
items.zh: Imagen包含一个冻结的T5-XXL[52]编码器，用于将输入文本映射为嵌入序列，以及一个64×64的图像扩散模型，随后是两个超分辨率扩散模型，用于生成256×256和1024×1024的图像（见图A.4）。所有扩散模型都以文本嵌入序列为条件，并使用无分类器引导[27]。Imagen依赖于新的采样技术，允许使用大的引导权重而不会出现先前工作中观察到的样本质量下降，从而生成比以往更高保真度和更好图像-文本对齐的图像。

items.en: While conceptually simple and easy to train, Imagen yields surprisingly strong results. Imagen outperforms other methods on COCO [36] with zero-shot FID-30K of 7.27, significantly outperforming prior work such as GLIDE [41] (at 12.4) and the concurrent work of DALL-E 2 [54] (at 10.4). Our zero-shot FID score is also better than state-of-the-art models trained on COCO, e.g., Make-A-Scene [22] (at 7.6). Additionally, human raters indicate that generated samples from Imagen are on-par in image-text alignment to the reference images on COCO captions.
items.zh: 虽然概念简单且易于训练，但Imagen产生了令人惊讶的强大结果。Imagen在COCO[36]上的零样本FID-30K为7.27，显著优于先前的工作，如GLIDE[41]（12.4）和同期工作DALL-E 2[54]（10.4）。我们的零样本FID分数也优于在COCO上训练的最先进模型，例如Make-A-Scene[22]（7.6）。此外，人类评估者表示，Imagen生成的样本在图像-文本对齐方面与COCO标题上的参考图像相当。

items.en: We introduce DrawBench, a new structured suite of text prompts for text-to-image evaluation. DrawBench enables deeper insights through a multi-dimensional evaluation of text-to-image models, with text prompts designed to probe different semantic properties of models. These include compositionality, cardinality, spatial relations, the ability to handle complex text prompts or prompts with rare words, and they include creative prompts that push the limits of models’ ability to generate highly implausible scenes well beyond the scope of the training data. With DrawBench, extensive human evaluation shows that Imagen outperforms other recent methods [57, 12, 54] by a significant margin. We further demonstrate some of the clear advantages of the use of large pre-trained language models [52] over multi-modal embeddings such as CLIP [49] as a text encoder for Imagen.
items.zh: 我们引入了DrawBench，一个新的结构化文本提示套件，用于文本到图像评估。DrawBench通过对文本到图像模型进行多维评估提供更深入的见解，其文本提示旨在探测模型的不同语义属性。这些包括组合性、基数性、空间关系、处理复杂文本提示或包含罕见词的提示的能力，以及推动模型生成高度不可能场景（远超训练数据范围）的创意提示。通过DrawBench，广泛的人类评估表明，Imagen显著优于其他近期方法[57, 12, 54]。我们进一步展示了使用大型预训练语言模型[52]作为Imagen的文本编码器相比多模态嵌入（如CLIP[49]）的一些明显优势。

items.en: We discover that large frozen language models trained only on text data are surprisingly very effective text encoders for text-to-image generation, and that scaling the size of frozen text encoder improves sample quality significantly more than scaling the size of image diffusion model.
items.zh: 我们发现，仅在文本数据上训练的大型冻结语言模型对于文本到图像生成来说是非常有效的文本编码器，并且增加冻结文本编码器的规模比增加图像扩散模型的规模更能显著提升样本质量。

items.en: We introduce dynamic thresholding, a new diffusion sampling technique to leverage high guidance weights and generating more photorealistic and detailed images than previously possible.
items.zh: 我们引入了动态阈值化，一种新的扩散采样技术，以利用高引导权重并生成比以往更逼真和更详细的图像。

items.en: We highlight several important diffusion architecture design choices and propose Efficient U-Net, a new architecture variant which is simpler, converges faster and is more memory efficient.
items.zh: 我们强调了几个重要的扩散架构设计选择，并提出了Efficient U-Net，一种新的架构变体，更简单、收敛更快且内存效率更高。

items.en: We achieve a new state-of-the-art COCO FID of 7.27. Human raters find Imagen to be on-par with the reference images in terms of image-text alignment.
items.zh: 我们在COCO上取得了7.27的最新FID分数。人类评估者发现Imagen在图像-文本对齐方面与参考图像相当。

items.en: We introduce DrawBench, a new comprehensive and challenging evaluation benchmark for the text-to-image task. On DrawBench human evaluation, we find Imagen to outperform all other work, including the concurrent work of DALL-E 2 [54].
items.zh: 我们引入了DrawBench，一个用于文本到图像任务的新的全面且具有挑战性的评估基准。在DrawBench的人类评估中，我们发现Imagen优于所有其他工作，包括同期工作DALL-E 2[54]。

items.en: Imagen consists of a text encoder that maps text to a sequence of embeddings and a cascade of conditional diffusion models that map these embeddings to images of increasing resolutions (see Fig. A.4). In the following subsections, we describe each of these components in detail.
items.zh: Imagen由一个将文本映射为嵌入序列的文本编码器和一个级联的条件扩散模型组成，这些模型将这些嵌入映射为逐渐增加分辨率的图像（见图A.4）。在以下小节中，我们将详细描述这些组件中的每一个。

items.en: Text-to-image models need powerful semantic text encoders to capture the complexity and compositionality of arbitrary natural language text inputs. Text encoders trained on paired image-text data are standard in current text-to-image models; they can be trained from scratch [41, 53] or pretrained on image-text data [54] (e.g., CLIP [49]). The image-text training objectives suggest that these text encoders may encode visually semantic and meaningful representations especially relevant for the text-to-image generation task. Large language models can be another models of choice to encode text for text-to-image generation. Recent progress in large language models (e.g., BERT [15], GPT [47, 48, 7], T5 [52]) have led to leaps in textual understanding and generative capabilities. Language models are trained on text only corpus significantly larger than paired image-text data, thus being exposed to a very rich and wide distribution of text. These models are also generally much larger than text encoders in current image-text models [49, 31, 80] (e.g. PaLM [11] has 540B parameters, while CoCa [80] has a ≈\approx 1B parameter text encoder).
items.zh: 文本到图像模型需要强大的语义文本编码器来捕获任意自然语言文本输入的复杂性和组合性。在当前的文本到图像模型中，标准做法是使用在配对图像-文本数据上训练的文本编码器；这些编码器可以从头开始训练 [41, 53]，也可以在图像-文本数据上预训练 [54]（例如，CLIP [49]）。图像-文本训练目标表明，这些文本编码器可能编码与文本到图像生成任务特别相关的视觉语义和有意义的表示。大型语言模型可以是另一种选择，用于为文本到图像生成编码文本。大型语言模型的最新进展（例如，BERT [15]、GPT [47, 48, 7]、T5 [52]）在文本理解和生成能力方面取得了飞跃。语言模型仅在文本语料库上训练，该语料库远大于配对的图像-文本数据，因此暴露于非常丰富和广泛的文本分布。这些模型通常也比当前图像-文本模型中的文本编码器大得多 [49, 31, 80]（例如，PaLM [11] 有 540B 参数，而 CoCa [80] 有约 1B 参数的文本编码器）。

items.en: It thus becomes natural to explore both families of text encoders for the text-to-image task. Imagen explores pretrained text encoders: BERT [15], T5 [51] and CLIP [46]. For simplicity, we freeze the weights of these text encoders. Freezing has several advantages such as offline computation of embeddings, resulting in negligible computation or memory footprint during training of the text-to-image model. In our work, we find that there is a clear conviction that scaling the text encoder size improves the quality of text-to-image generation. We also find that while T5-XXL and CLIP text encoders perform similarly on simple benchmarks such as MS-COCO, human evaluators prefer T5-XXL encoders over CLIP text encoders in both image-text alignment and image fidelity on DrawBench, a set of challenging and compositional prompts. We refer the reader to Section 4.4 for summary of our findings, and Appendix D.1 for detailed ablations.
items.zh: 因此，很自然地探索这两类文本编码器用于文本到图像任务。Imagen 探索了预训练的文本编码器：BERT [15]、T5 [51] 和 CLIP [46]。为简单起见，我们冻结了这些文本编码器的权重。冻结有几个优点，例如可以离线计算嵌入，从而在文本到图像模型的训练过程中产生可忽略的计算或内存占用。在我们的工作中，我们发现一个明确的结论：扩大文本编码器规模可以提高文本到图像生成的质量。我们还发现，虽然 T5-XXL 和 CLIP 文本编码器在简单基准测试（如 MS-COCO）上表现相似，但人类评估者更喜欢 T5-XXL 编码器而不是 CLIP 文本编码器，无论是在图像-文本对齐还是图像保真度方面，在 DrawBench（一组具有挑战性和组合性的提示）上。我们请读者参考第 4.4 节以了解我们的发现总结，以及附录 D.1 以了解详细的消融实验。

items.en: Here we give a brief introduction to diffusion models; a precise description is in Appendix A. Diffusion models [63, 28, 65] are a class of generative models that convert Gaussian noise into samples from a learned data distribution via an iterative denoising process. These models can be conditional, for example on class labels, text, or low-resolution images [e.g. 16, 29, 59, 58, 75, 41, 54]. items.zh: 其中 (𝐱,𝐜) 是数据-条件对，t∼𝒰([0,1])，ϵ∼𝒩(𝟎,𝐈)，αt,σt,wt 是影响样本质量的 t 的函数。直观地说，𝐱^θ 被训练为使用平方误差损失将 𝐳t≔αt𝐱+σtϵ 去噪为 𝐱，加权以强调 t 的某些值。采样，如祖先采样 [28] 和 DDIM [64]，从纯噪声 𝐳1∼𝒩(𝟎,𝐈) 开始，迭代生成点 𝐳t1,…,𝐳tT，其中 1=t1>⋯>tT=0，这些点的噪声含量逐渐降低。这些点是 𝐱 预测 𝐱^0t≔𝐱^θ(𝐳t,𝐜) 的函数。

items.en: Classifier guidance [16] is a technique to improve sample quality while reducing diversity in conditional diffusion models using gradients from a pretrained model p​(𝐜|𝐳t)𝑝conditional𝐜subscript𝐳𝑡p(\mathbf{c}|\mathbf{z}_{t}) during sampling. Classifier-free guidance [27] is an alternative technique that avoids this pretrained model by instead jointly training a single diffusion model on conditional and unconditional objectives via randomly dropping 𝐜𝐜\mathbf{c} during training (e.g. with 10% probability). Sampling is performed using the adjusted 𝐱𝐱\mathbf{x}-prediction (𝐳t−σ​ϵ~θ)/αtsubscript𝐳𝑡𝜎subscript~bold-italic-ϵ𝜃subscript𝛼𝑡(\mathbf{z}_{t}-\sigma\tilde{\boldsymbol{\epsilon}}_{\theta})/\alpha_{t}, where
items.zh: 分类器引导 [16] 是一种技术，通过在采样过程中使用预训练模型 p(𝐜|𝐳t) 的梯度来提高条件扩散模型中的样本质量，同时减少多样性。无分类器引导 [27] 是一种替代技术，通过在训练期间随机丢弃 𝐜（例如，以 10% 的概率）联合训练单个扩散模型的条件和无条件目标，从而避免这种预训练模型。采样使用调整后的 𝐱 预测 (𝐳t−σϵ~θ)/αt 进行，其中

items.en: Here, ϵθ​(𝐳t,𝐜)subscriptbold-italic-ϵ𝜃subscript𝐳𝑡𝐜{\boldsymbol{\epsilon}}_{\theta}(\mathbf{z}_{t},\mathbf{c}) and ϵθ​(𝐳t)subscriptbold-italic-ϵ𝜃subscript𝐳𝑡{\boldsymbol{\epsilon}}_{\theta}(\mathbf{z}_{t}) are conditional and unconditional ϵbold-italic-ϵ{\boldsymbol{\epsilon}}-predictions, given by ϵθ≔(𝐳t−αt​𝐱^θ)/σt≔subscriptbold-italic-ϵ𝜃subscript𝐳𝑡subscript𝛼𝑡subscript^𝐱𝜃subscript𝜎𝑡{\boldsymbol{\epsilon}}_{\theta}\coloneqq(\mathbf{z}_{t}-\alpha_{t}\hat{\mathbf{x}}_{\theta})/\sigma_{t}, and w𝑤w is the guidance weight. Setting w=1𝑤1w=1 disables classifier-free guidance, while increasing w>1𝑤1w>1 strengthens the effect of guidance. Imagen depends critically on classifier-free guidance for effective text conditioning.
items.zh: 这里，ϵθ(𝐳t,𝐜) 和 ϵθ(𝐳t) 是条件和无条件的 ϵ 预测，由 ϵθ≔(𝐳t−αt𝐱^θ)/σt 给出，w 是引导权重。设置 w=1 禁用无分类器引导，而增加 w>1 会增强引导的效果。Imagen 关键依赖于无分类器引导以实现有效的文本条件。

items.en: We corroborate the results of recent text-guided diffusion work [16, 41, 54] and find that increasing the classifier-free guidance weight improves image-text alignment, but damages image fidelity producing highly saturated and unnatural images [27]. We find that this is due to a train-test mismatch arising from high guidance weights. At each sampling step t𝑡t, the 𝐱𝐱\mathbf{x}-prediction 𝐱^0tsubscriptsuperscript^𝐱𝑡0\hat{\mathbf{x}}^{t}_{0} must be within the same bounds as training data 𝐱𝐱\mathbf{x}, i.e. within [−1,1]11[-1,1], but we find empirically that high guidance weights cause 𝐱𝐱\mathbf{x}-predictions to exceed these bounds. This is a train-test mismatch, and since the diffusion model is iteratively applied on its own output throughout sampling, the sampling process produces unnatural images and sometimes even diverges. To counter this problem, we investigate static thresholding and dynamic thresholding. See Appendix Fig. A.31 for reference implementation of the techniques and Appendix Fig. A.9 for visualizations of their effects.
items.zh: 我们证实了最近文本引导扩散工作 [16, 41, 54] 的结果，并发现增加无分类器引导权重可以提高图像-文本对齐，但会损害图像保真度，产生高度饱和和不自然的图像 [27]。我们发现这是由于高引导权重导致的训练-测试不匹配。在每个采样步骤 t，𝐱 预测 𝐱^0t 必须与训练数据 𝐱 处于相同的范围内，即在 [-1,1] 内，但我们凭经验发现高引导权重会导致 𝐱 预测超出这些范围。这是一个训练-测试不匹配，并且由于扩散模型在采样过程中迭代地应用于其自身输出，采样过程会产生不自然的图像，有时甚至发散。为了解决这个问题，我们研究了静态阈值和动态阈值。有关这些技术的参考实现，请参见附录图 A.31，有关其效果的视觉效果，请参见附录图 A.9。

items.en: Static thresholding: We refer to elementwise clipping the 𝐱𝐱\mathbf{x}-prediction to [−1,1]11[-1,1] as static thresholding. This method was in fact used but not emphasized in previous work [28], and to our knowledge its importance has not been investigated in the context of guided sampling. We discover that static thresholding is essential to sampling with large guidance weights and prevents generation of blank images. Nonetheless, static thresholding still results in over-saturated and less detailed images as the guidance weight further increases.
items.zh: 静态阈值：我们将 𝐱 预测逐元素裁剪到 [-1,1] 称为静态阈值。这种方法实际上在以前的工作 [28] 中使用过但没有强调，据我们所知，其在引导采样中的重要性尚未被研究。我们发现静态阈值对于使用大引导权重进行采样至关重要，并防止生成空白图像。尽管如此，随着引导权重的进一步增加，静态阈值仍然会导致过度饱和和细节较少的图像。

items.en: Dynamic thresholding: We introduce a new dynamic thresholding method: at each sampling step we set s𝑠s to a certain percentile absolute pixel value in 𝐱^0tsubscriptsuperscript^𝐱𝑡0\hat{\mathbf{x}}^{t}_{0}, and if s>1𝑠1s>1, then we threshold 𝐱^0tsubscriptsuperscript^𝐱𝑡0\hat{\mathbf{x}}^{t}_{0} to the range [−s,s]𝑠𝑠[-s,s] and then divide by s𝑠s. Dynamic thresholding pushes saturated pixels (those near -1 and 1) inwards, thereby actively preventing pixels from saturation at each step. We find that dynamic thresholding results in significantly better photorealism as well as better image-text alignment, especially when using very large guidance weights.
items.zh: 动态阈值：我们引入了一种新的动态阈值方法：在每个采样步骤，我们将 s 设置为 𝐱^0t 中某个百分比的绝对像素值，如果 s>1，则将 𝐱^0t 阈值化到范围 [-s,s]，然后除以 s。动态阈值将饱和像素（那些接近 -1 和 1 的像素）向内推，从而在每个步骤主动防止像素饱和。我们发现动态阈值显著提高了照片真实感以及图像-文本对齐，尤其是在使用非常大的引导权重时。

items.en: Imagen utilizes a pipeline of a base 64×64646464\times 64 model, and two text-conditional super-resolution diffusion models to upsample a 64×64646464\times 64 generated image into a 256×256256256256\times 256 image, and then to 1024×1024102410241024\times 1024 image. Cascaded diffusion models with noise conditioning augmentation [29] have been extremely effective in progressively generating high-fidelity images. Furthermore, making the super-resolution models aware of the amount of noise added, via noise level conditioning, significantly improves the sample quality and helps improving the robustness of the super-resolution models to handle artifacts generated by lower resolution models [29]. Imagen uses noise conditioning augmentation for both the super-resolution models. We find this to be a critical for generating high fidelity images.
items.zh: Imagen 利用一个由基础 64×64 模型和两个文本条件的超分辨率扩散模型组成的流水线，将生成的 64×64 图像上采样为 256×256 图像，然后上采样为 1024×1024 图像。带有噪声条件增强的级联扩散模型 [29] 在逐步生成高保真图像方面非常有效。此外，通过噪声水平调节使超分辨率模型感知添加的噪声量，显著提高了样本质量，并有助于提高超分辨率模型处理低分辨率模型产生的伪影的鲁棒性 [29]。Imagen 对两个超分辨率模型都使用了噪声条件增强。我们发现这对于生成高保真图像至关重要。

items.en: Given a conditioning low-resolution image and augmentation level (a.k.a aug​_​levelaug_level\mathrm{aug\_level}) (e.g., strength of Gaussian noise or blur), we corrupt the low-resolution image with the augmentation (corresponding to aug​_​levelaug_level\mathrm{aug\_level}), and condition the diffusion model on aug​_​levelaug_level\mathrm{aug\_level}. During training, aug​_​levelaug_level\mathrm{aug\_level} is chosen randomly, while during inference, we sweep over its different values to find the best sample quality. In our case, we use Gaussian noise as a form of augmentation, and apply variance preserving Gaussian noise augmentation resembling the forward process used in diffusion models (Appendix A). The augmentation level is specified using aug​_​level∈[0,1]aug_level01\mathrm{aug\_level}\in[0,1]. See Fig. A.32 for reference pseudocode.
items.zh: 给定一个条件低分辨率图像和增强级别（例如，高斯噪声或模糊的强度），我们用增强（对应于增强级别）破坏低分辨率图像，并在增强级别上条件扩散模型。在训练期间，增强级别是随机选择的，而在推理期间，我们扫描其不同值以找到最佳样本质量。在我们的案例中，我们使用高斯噪声作为增强形式，并应用类似于扩散模型中使用的正向过程的方差保持高斯噪声增强（附录 A）。增强级别使用 aug_level∈[0,1] 指定。参考伪代码见图 A.32。

items.en: Base model: We adapt the U-Net architecture from [40] for our base 64×64646464\times 64 text-to-image diffusion model. The network is conditioned on text embeddings via a pooled embedding vector, added to the diffusion timestep embedding similar to the class embedding conditioning method used in [16, 29]. We further condition on the entire sequence of text embeddings by adding cross attention [57] over the text embeddings at multiple resolutions. We study various methods of text conditioning in Section D.3.1. Furthermore, we found Layer Normalization [2] for text embeddings in the attention and pooling layers to help considerably improve performance.
items.zh: 基础模型：我们改编了 [40] 中的 U-Net 架构，用于我们的基础 64×64 文本到图像扩散模型。网络通过池化嵌入向量在文本嵌入上条件，该向量添加到扩散时间步嵌入中，类似于 [16, 29] 中使用的类别嵌入条件方法。我们进一步通过跨多个分辨率在文本嵌入上添加交叉注意力 [57] 来在整个文本嵌入序列上条件。我们在第 D.3.1 节研究了文本条件的各种方法。此外，我们发现对注意力层和池化层中的文本嵌入进行层归一化 [2] 有助于显著提高性能。

items.en: Super-resolution models: For 64×64→256×256→646425625664\times 64\rightarrow 256\times 256 super-resolution, we use the U-Net model adapted from [40, 58]. We make several modifications to this U-Net model for improving memory efficiency, inference time and convergence speed (our variant is 2-3x faster in steps/second over the U-Net used in [40, 58]). We call this variant Efficient U-Net (See Appendix B.1 for more details and comparisons). Our 256×256→1024×1024→25625610241024256\times 256\rightarrow 1024\times 1024 super-resolution model trains on 64×64→256×256→646425625664\times 64\rightarrow 256\times 256 crops of the 1024×1024102410241024\times 1024 image. To facilitate this, we remove the self-attention layers, however we keep the text cross-attention layers which we found to be critical. During inference, the model receives the full 256×256256256256\times 256 low-resolution images as inputs, and returns upsampled 1024×1024102410241024\times 1024 images as outputs. Note that we use text cross attention for both our super-resolution models.
items.zh: 超分辨率模型：对于 64×64→256×256 超分辨率，我们使用改编自 [40, 58] 的 U-Net 模型。我们对这个 U-Net 模型进行了几项修改，以提高内存效率、推理时间和收敛速度（我们的变体在步数/秒上比 [40, 58] 中使用的 U-Net 快 2-3 倍）。我们将此变体称为高效 U-Net（更多细节和比较见附录 B.1）。我们的 256×256→1024×1024 超分辨率模型在 1024×1024 图像的 64×64→256×256 裁剪上训练。为了便于实现，我们移除了自注意力层，但保留了文本交叉注意力层，我们发现这些层至关重要。在推理期间，模型接收完整的 256×256 低分辨率图像作为输入，并返回上采样的 1024×1024 图像作为输出。请注意，我们对两个超分辨率模型都使用了文本交叉注意力。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Non-cherry picked Imagen samples for different categories of prompts from DrawBench.
items.capZh: 图 2：来自 DrawBench 不同类别提示的非精选 Imagen 样本。

items.en: The COCO [36] validation set is the standard benchmark for evaluating text-to-image models for both the supervised [82, 22] and the zero-shot setting [53, 41]. The key automated performance metrics used are FID [26] to measure image fidelity, and CLIP score [25, 49] to measure image-text alignment. Consistent with previous works, we report zero-shot FID-30K, for which 30K prompts are drawn randomly from the validation set, and the model samples generated on these prompts are compared with reference images from the full validation set. Since guidance weight is an important ingredient to control image quality and text alignment, we report most of our ablation results using trade-off (or pareto) curves between CLIP and FID scores across a range of guidance weights.
items.zh: COCO [36] 验证集是评估文本到图像模型的标准基准，适用于监督 [82, 22] 和零样本设置 [53, 41]。使用的关键自动性能指标是 FID [26]（用于测量图像保真度）和 CLIP 分数 [25, 49]（用于测量图像-文本对齐）。与之前的工作一致，我们报告零样本 FID-30K，其中从验证集中随机抽取 30K 个提示，并将在这些提示上生成的模型样本与完整验证集中的参考图像进行比较。由于引导权重是控制图像质量和文本对齐的重要因素，我们通过在一系列引导权重下 CLIP 和 FID 分数之间的权衡（或帕累托）曲线报告我们的大多数消融结果。

items.en: Both FID and CLIP scores have limitations, for example FID is not fully aligned with perceptual quality [42], and CLIP is ineffective at counting [49]. Due to these limitations, we use human evaluation to assess image quality and caption similarity, with ground truth reference caption-image pairs as a baseline. We use two experimental paradigms:
items.zh: FID 和 CLIP 分数都有局限性，例如 FID 不完全符合感知质量 [42]，而 CLIP 在计数方面无效 [49]。由于这些局限性，我们使用人类评估来评估图像质量和标题相似性，以真实参考标题-图像对作为基线。我们使用两种实验范式：

items.en: To probe image quality, the rater is asked to select between the model generation and reference image using the question: “Which image is more photorealistic (looks more real)?”. We report the percentage of times raters choose model generations over reference images (the preference rate).
items.zh: 为了探究图像质量，评估者被要求使用问题“哪个图像更逼真（看起来更真实）？”在模型生成和参考图像之间进行选择。我们报告评估者选择模型生成而非参考图像的百分比（偏好率）。

items.en: To probe alignment, human raters are shown an image and a prompt and asked “Does the caption accurately describe the above image?”. They must respond with “yes”, “somewhat”, or “no”. These responses are scored as 100, 50, and 0, respectively. These ratings are obtained independently for model samples and reference images, and both are reported.
items.zh: 为了探究对齐，人类评估者被展示一张图像和一个提示，并被问到“标题是否准确描述了上面的图像？”他们必须回答“是”、“有点”或“否”。这些回答分别计为 100、50 和 0。这些评分分别针对模型样本和参考图像独立获得，并报告两者。

items.en: For both cases we use 200 randomly chosen image-caption pairs from the COCO validation set. Subjects were shown batches of 50 images. We also used interleaved “control" trials, and only include rater data from those who correctly answered at least 80% of the control questions. This netted 73 and 51 ratings per image for image quality and image-text alignment evaluations, respectively.
items.zh: 对于这两种情况，我们使用来自 COCO 验证集的 200 个随机选择的图像-标题对。受试者被展示每批 50 张图像。我们还使用了交错的“控制”试验，并且只包含那些正确回答至少 80% 控制问题的评估者的数据。这分别为图像质量和图像-文本对齐评估获得了每张图像 73 和 51 个评分。

items.en: DrawBench: While COCO is a valuable benchmark, it is increasingly clear that it has a limited spectrum of prompts that do not readily provide insight into differences between models (e.g., see Sec. 4.2). Recent work by [10] proposed a new evaluation set called PaintSkills to systematically evaluate visual reasoning skills and social biases beyond COCO. With similar motivation, we introduce DrawBench, a comprehensive and challenging set of prompts that support the evaluation and comparison of text-to-image models. DrawBench contains 11 categories of prompts, testing different capabilities of models such as the ability to faithfully render different colors, numbers of objects, spatial relations, text in the scene, and unusual interactions between objects. Categories also include complex prompts, including long, intricate textual descriptions, rare words, and also misspelled prompts. We also include sets of prompts collected from DALL-E [53], Gary Marcus et al. [38] and Reddit. Across these 11 categories, DrawBench comprises 200 prompts in total, striking a good balance between the desire for a large, comprehensive dataset, and small enough that human evaluation remains feasible. (Appendix C provides a more detailed description of DrawBench. Fig. 2 shows example prompts from DrawBench with Imagen samples.)
items.zh: DrawBench：虽然 COCO 是一个有价值的基准，但越来越清楚的是，它的提示范围有限，不能轻易提供模型之间的差异洞察（例如，参见第 4.2 节）。最近 [10] 的工作提出了一个新的评估集，称为 PaintSkills，以系统评估视觉推理技能和社会偏见，超越 COCO。出于类似的动机，我们引入了 DrawBench，这是一个全面且具有挑战性的提示集，支持文本到图像模型的评估和比较。DrawBench 包含 11 个类别的提示，测试模型的不同能力，例如忠实渲染不同颜色、物体数量、空间关系、场景中的文本以及物体之间不寻常交互的能力。类别还包括复杂提示，包括长而复杂的文本描述、罕见词以及拼写错误的提示。我们还包含了从 DALL-E [53]、Gary Marcus 等人 [38] 和 Reddit 收集的提示集。在这 11 个类别中，DrawBench 总共包含 200 个提示，在渴望大型、全面数据集与足够小以便人类评估可行之间取得了良好的平衡。（附录 C 提供了 DrawBench 的更详细描述。图 2 显示了 DrawBench 中的示例提示及 Imagen 样本。）

items.en: We use DrawBench to directly compare different models. To this end, human raters are presented with two sets of images, one from Model A and one from Model B, each of which has 8 samples. Human raters are asked to compare Model A and Model B on sample fidelity and image-text alignment. They respond with one of three choices: Prefer Model A; Indifferent; or Prefer Model B.
items.zh: 我们使用 DrawBench 直接比较不同模型。为此，人类评估者会看到两组图像，一组来自模型 A，另一组来自模型 B，每组各有 8 个样本。人类评估者被要求根据样本保真度和图像-文本对齐来比较模型 A 和模型 B。他们从三个选项中选择一个：偏好模型 A；无偏好；或偏好模型 B。

items.en: Section 4.1 describes training details, Sections 4.2 and 4.3 analyze results on MS-COCO and DrawBench, and Section 4.4 summarizes our ablation studies and key findings. For all experiments below, the images are fair random samples from Imagen with no post-processing or re-ranking.
items.zh: 第 4.1 节描述了训练细节，第 4.2 和 4.3 节分析了在 MS-COCO 和 DrawBench 上的结果，第 4.4 节总结了我们的消融研究和关键发现。在以下所有实验中，图像均来自 Imagen 的公平随机样本，未进行后处理或重新排序。

items.en: Unless specified, we train a 2B parameter model for the 64×64646464\times 64 text-to-image synthesis, and 600M and 400M parameter models for 64×64→256×256→646425625664\times 64\rightarrow 256\times 256 and 256×256→1024×1024→25625610241024256\times 256\rightarrow 1024\times 1024 for super-resolution respectively. We use a batch size of 2048 and 2.5M training steps for all models. We use 256 TPU-v4 chips for our base 64×64646464\times 64 model, and 128 TPU-v4 chips for both super-resolution models. We do not find over-fitting to be an issue, and we believe further training might improve overall performance. We use Adafactor for our base 64×64646464\times 64 model, because initial comparisons with Adam suggested similar performance with much smaller memory footprint for Adafactor. For super-resolution models, we use Adam as we found Adafactor to hurt model quality in our initial ablations. For classifier-free guidance, we joint-train unconditionally via zeroing out the text embeddings with 10% probability for all three models. We train on a combination of internal datasets, with ≈\approx 460M image-text pairs, and the publicly available Laion dataset [61], with ≈\approx 400M image-text pairs. There are limitations in our training data, and we refer the reader to Section 6 for details. See Appendix F for more implementation details.
items.zh: 除非另有说明，我们为 64×64 的文本到图像合成训练了一个 2B 参数的模型，并为超分辨率分别训练了 600M 和 400M 参数的模型（64×64→256×256 和 256×256→1024×1024）。所有模型均使用批量大小 2048 和 250 万训练步数。我们为基本的 64×64 模型使用 256 个 TPU-v4 芯片，为两个超分辨率模型各使用 128 个 TPU-v4 芯片。我们没有发现过拟合问题，并相信进一步训练可能会提高整体性能。我们为基本的 64×64 模型使用 Adafactor，因为与 Adam 的初步比较表明 Adafactor 在性能相似的情况下内存占用更小。对于超分辨率模型，我们使用 Adam，因为在初步消融中我们发现 Adafactor 会损害模型质量。对于无分类器引导，我们通过以 10% 的概率将文本嵌入置零来联合训练无条件模型。我们在内部数据集（约 4.6 亿图像-文本对）和公开的 Laion 数据集 [61]（约 4 亿图像-文本对）的组合上进行训练。我们的训练数据存在局限性，请读者参阅第 6 节了解详情。更多实现细节见附录 F。

items.en: We evaluate Imagen on the COCO validation set using FID score, similar to [53, 41]. Table 2 displays the results. Imagen achieves state of the art zero-shot FID on COCO at 7.27, outperforming the concurrent work of DALL-E 2 [54] and even models trained on COCO. Table 2 reports the human evaluation to test image quality and alignment on the COCO validation set. We report results on the original COCO validation set, as well as a filtered version in which all reference data with people have been removed. For photorealism, Imagen achieves 39.2% preference rate indicating high image quality generation. On the set with no people, there is a boost in preference rate of Imagen to 43.6%, indicating Imagen’s limited ability to generate photorealistic people. On caption similarity, Imagen’s score is on-par with the original reference images, suggesting Imagen’s ability to generate images that align well with COCO captions.
items.zh: 我们使用 FID 分数在 COCO 验证集上评估 Imagen，类似于 [53, 41]。表 2 显示了结果。Imagen 在 COCO 上实现了最先进的零样本 FID 为 7.27，优于同期工作 DALL-E 2 [54] 甚至是在 COCO 上训练的模型。表 2 报告了在 COCO 验证集上测试图像质量和对齐的人工评估结果。我们报告了原始 COCO 验证集以及过滤版本（移除了所有包含人物的参考数据）的结果。在照片真实感方面，Imagen 达到了 39.2% 的偏好率，表明其生成了高质量的图像。在无人物集上，Imagen 的偏好率提升至 43.6%，表明 Imagen 生成逼真人物的能力有限。在标题相似性方面，Imagen 的得分与原始参考图像相当，表明 Imagen 能够生成与 COCO 标题良好对齐的图像。

items.en: Diffusion models have seen wide success in image generation [28, 40, 59, 16, 29, 58], outperforming GANs in fidelity and diversity, without training instability and mode collapse issues [6, 16, 29]. Autoregressive models [37], GANs [76, 81], VQ-VAE Transformer-based methods [53, 22], and diffusion models have seen remarkable progress in text-to-image [57, 41, 57], including the concurrent DALL-E 2 [54], which uses a diffusion prior on CLIP text latents and cascaded diffusion models to generate high resolution 1024×1024102410241024\times 1024 images; we believe Imagen is much simpler, as Imagen does not need to learn a latent prior, yet achieves better results in both MS-COCO FID and human evaluation on DrawBench. GLIDE [41] also uses cascaded diffusion models for text-to-image, but we use large pretrained frozen language models, which we found to be instrumental to both image fidelity and image-text alignment. XMC-GAN [81] also uses BERT as a text encoder, but we scale to much larger text encoders and demonstrate the effectiveness thereof. The use of cascaded models is also popular throughout the literature [14, 39] and has been used with success in diffusion models to generate high resolution images [16, 29].
items.zh: 扩散模型在图像生成方面取得了广泛成功 [28, 40, 59, 16, 29, 58]，在保真度和多样性上超越了 GAN，且没有训练不稳定和模式崩溃的问题 [6, 16, 29]。自回归模型 [37]、GAN [76, 81]、基于 VQ-VAE Transformer 的方法 [53, 22] 和扩散模型在文本到图像方面取得了显著进展 [57, 41, 57]，包括同期工作 DALL-E 2 [54]，它使用 CLIP 文本潜变量的扩散先验和级联扩散模型生成高分辨率 1024×1024 图像；我们认为 Imagen 更简单，因为它不需要学习潜变量先验，但在 MS-COCO FID 和 DrawBench 人工评估上都取得了更好的结果。GLIDE [41] 也使用级联扩散模型进行文本到图像生成，但我们使用大型预训练冻结语言模型，我们发现这对图像保真度和图像-文本对齐都至关重要。XMC-GAN [81] 也使用 BERT 作为文本编码器，但我们扩展到更大的文本编码器并证明了其有效性。级联模型的使用在文献中也很普遍 [14, 39]，并已成功用于扩散模型生成高分辨率图像 [16, 29]。

full.secZh: 6 结论、局限性与社会影响

items.en: Imagen showcases the effectiveness of frozen large pretrained language models as text encoders for the text-to-image generation using diffusion models. Our observation that scaling the size of these language models have significantly more impact than scaling the U-Net size on overall performance encourages future research directions on exploring even bigger language models as text encoders. Furthermore, through Imagen we re-emphasize the importance of classifier-free guidance, and we introduce dynamic thresholding, which allows usage of much higher guidance weights than seen in previous works. With these novel components, Imagen produces 1024×1024102410241024\times 1024 samples with unprecedented photorealism and alignment with text.
items.zh: Imagen 展示了冻结的大型预训练语言模型作为文本编码器在使用扩散模型进行文本到图像生成中的有效性。我们观察到，扩大这些语言模型的规模对整体性能的影响远大于扩大 U-Net 的规模，这鼓励了未来探索更大语言模型作为文本编码器的研究方向。此外，通过 Imagen，我们再次强调了无分类器引导的重要性，并引入了动态阈值化，这使得可以使用比以往工作更高的引导权重。凭借这些新颖的组件，Imagen 生成了具有前所未有照片真实感和文本对齐的 1024×1024 样本。

items.en: Our primary aim with Imagen is to advance research on generative methods, using text-to-image synthesis as a test bed. While end-user applications of generative methods remain largely out of scope, we recognize the potential downstream applications of this research are varied and may impact society in complex ways. On the one hand, generative models have a great potential to complement, extend, and augment human creativity [30]. Text-to-image generation models, in particular, have the potential to extend image-editing capabilities and lead to the development of new tools for creative practitioners. On the other hand, generative methods can be leveraged for malicious purposes, including harassment and misinformation spread [20], and raise many concerns regarding social and cultural exclusion and bias [67, 62, 68]. These considerations inform our decision to not to release code or a public demo. In future work we will explore a framework for responsible externalization that balances the value of external auditing with the risks of unrestricted open-access.
items.zh: 我们使用 Imagen 的主要目标是以文本到图像合成为试验台，推进生成方法的研究。虽然生成方法的最终用户应用在很大程度上不在范围内，但我们认识到这项研究的潜在下游应用多种多样，并可能以复杂的方式影响社会。一方面，生成模型具有补充、扩展和增强人类创造力的巨大潜力 [30]。特别是文本到图像生成模型，有潜力扩展图像编辑能力，并为创意从业者开发新工具。另一方面，生成方法可能被用于恶意目的，包括骚扰和错误信息传播 [20]，并引发关于社会和文化排斥及偏见的许多担忧 [67, 62, 68]。这些考虑促使我们决定不发布代码或公开演示。在未来的工作中，我们将探索一个负责任的外部化框架，以平衡外部审计的价值与不受限制的开放访问的风险。

items.en: Another ethical challenge relates to the large scale data requirements of text-to-image models, which have have led researchers to rely heavily on large, mostly uncurated, web-scraped datasets. While this approach has enabled rapid algorithmic advances in recent years, datasets of this nature have been critiqued and contested along various ethical dimensions. For example, public and academic discourse regarding appropriate use of public data has raised concerns regarding data subject awareness and consent [24, 18, 60, 43]. Dataset audits have revealed these datasets tend to reflect social stereotypes, oppressive viewpoints, and derogatory, or otherwise harmful, associations to marginalized identity groups [44, 4]. Training text-to-image models on this data risks reproducing these associations and causing significant representational harm that would disproportionately impact individuals and communities already experiencing marginalization, discrimination and exclusion within society. As such, there are a multitude of data challenges that must be addressed before text-to-image models like Imagen can be safely integrated into user-facing applications. While we do not directly address these challenges in this work, an awareness of the limitations of our training data guide our decision not to release Imagen for public use. We strongly caution against the use text-to-image generation methods for any user-facing tools without close care and attention to the contents of the training dataset.
items.zh: 另一个伦理挑战与文本到图像模型的大规模数据需求有关，这导致研究人员严重依赖大型、大多未经整理的网络抓取数据集。虽然这种方法近年来推动了快速的算法进步，但这种性质的数据集在多个伦理维度上受到了批评和质疑。例如，关于公共数据适当使用的公共和学术讨论引发了对数据主体意识和同意的担忧 [24, 18, 60, 43]。数据集审计揭示，这些数据集往往反映社会刻板印象、压迫性观点以及针对边缘化身份群体的贬低或有害关联 [44, 4]。在这些数据上训练文本到图像模型有重现这些关联的风险，并造成重大的代表性伤害，对已经经历社会边缘化、歧视和排斥的个人和社区产生不成比例的影响。因此，在像 Imagen 这样的文本到图像模型能够安全集成到面向用户的应用之前，必须解决许多数据挑战。虽然我们在本工作中没有直接解决这些挑战，但对训练数据局限性的认识指导了我们决定不发布 Imagen 供公众使用。我们强烈警告，在未仔细关注训练数据集内容的情况下，不要将文本到图像生成方法用于任何面向用户的工具。

items.en: Imagen’s training data was drawn from several pre-existing datasets of image and English alt-text pairs. A subset of this data was filtered to removed noise and undesirable content, such as pornographic imagery and toxic language. However, a recent audit of one of our data sources, LAION-400M [61], uncovered a wide range of inappropriate content including pornographic imagery, racist slurs, and harmful social stereotypes [4]. This finding informs our assessment that Imagen is not suitable for public use at this time and also demonstrates the value of rigorous dataset audits and comprehensive dataset documentation (e.g. [23, 45]) in informing consequent decisions about the model’s appropriate and safe use. Imagen also relies on text encoders trained on uncurated web-scale data, and thus inherits the social biases and limitations of large language models [5, 3, 50].
items.zh: Imagen 的训练数据来自几个预先存在的图像和英文替代文本对数据集。这些数据的一个子集经过过滤，以去除噪声和不良内容，如色情图像和有毒语言。然而，最近对我们数据源之一 LAION-400M [61] 的审计发现了各种不当内容，包括色情图像、种族歧视言论和有害的社会刻板印象 [4]。这一发现使我们评估 Imagen 目前不适合公开使用，同时也证明了严格的数据集审计和全面的数据集文档（例如 [23, 45]）在指导后续关于模型适当和安全使用的决策方面的价值。Imagen 还依赖于在未经整理的网络规模数据上训练的文本编码器，因此继承了大型语言模型的社会偏见和局限性 [5, 3, 50]。

items.en: While we leave an in-depth empirical analysis of social and cultural biases encoded by Imagen to future work, our small scale internal assessments reveal several limitations that guide our decision not to release Imagen at this time. First, all generative models, including Imagen, Imagen, may run into danger of dropping modes of the data distribution, which may further compound the social consequence of dataset bias. Second, Imagen exhibits serious limitations when generating images depicting people. Our human evaluations found Imagen obtains significantly higher preference rates when evaluated on images that do not portray people, indicating a degradation in image fidelity. Finally, our preliminary assessment also suggests Imagen encodes several social biases and stereotypes, including an overall bias towards generating images of people with lighter skin tones and a tendency for images portraying different professions to align with Western gender stereotypes. Even when we focus generations away from people, our preliminary analysis indicates Imagen encodes a range of social and cultural biases when generating images of activities, events, and objects.
items.zh: 虽然我们将对 Imagen 编码的社会和文化偏见的深入实证分析留给未来工作，但我们小规模的内部评估揭示了几个局限性，指导我们决定目前不发布 Imagen。首先，所有生成模型，包括 Imagen，都可能面临数据分布模式丢失的危险，这可能进一步加剧数据集偏见的社会后果。其次，Imagen 在生成描绘人物的图像时表现出严重局限性。我们的人工评估发现，当评估不包含人物的图像时，Imagen 获得了显著更高的偏好率，表明图像保真度下降。最后，我们的初步评估还表明，Imagen 编码了多种社会偏见和刻板印象，包括整体偏向生成肤色较浅的人物图像，以及不同职业的图像倾向于符合西方性别刻板印象。即使我们将生成重点从人物移开，我们的初步分析表明，Imagen 在生成活动、事件和物体的图像时也编码了一系列社会和文化偏见。

items.en: While there has been extensive work auditing image-to-text and image labeling models for forms of social bias (e.g. [8, 9, 68]), there has been comparatively less work on social bias evaluation methods for text-to-image models, with the recent exception of [10]. We believe this is a critical avenue for future research and we intend to explore benchmark evaluations for social and cultural bias in future work—for example, exploring whether it is possible to generalize the normalized pointwise mutual information metric [1] to the measurement of biases in image generation models. There is also a great need to develop a conceptual vocabulary around potential harms of text-to-image models that could guide the development of evaluation metrics and inform responsible model release. We aim to address these challenges in future work.
items.zh: 尽管已有大量工作审计图像到文本和图像标注模型的社会偏见形式（例如 [8, 9, 68]），但针对文本到图像模型的社会偏见评估方法的工作相对较少，最近的例外是 [10]。我们认为这是未来研究的一个关键方向，并打算在未来工作中探索社会和文化偏见的基准评估——例如，探索是否可以将归一化点互信息度量 [1] 推广到图像生成模型的偏见测量。此外，迫切需要开发一个关于文本到图像模型潜在危害的概念词汇，以指导评估指标的制定和负责任的模型发布。我们旨在未来的工作中解决这些挑战。
